conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the most significant bond with E, as we shared a deep mutual understanding of our family-driven motivations and reached a 5/5 connection level. I also felt very aligned with C and F, as both were willing to commit to looking out for each other and prioritizing mutual success for our families. Conversely, I felt the least connected to A, who remained a bit more distant and emphasized their individual focus despite our polite conversation.

I formed clear alliances with E, C, and F, agreeing that we should protect each other's interests to ensure we all bring something home for our families. I trust E implicitly because of our shared sense of urgency and the strength of our rapport. I am slightly wary of I, who expressed a high degree of caution and spent our time trying to "get a read" on others rather than building a solid foundation of trust.
